title: Reeded Frosted Glass Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Reeded Frosted Glass Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 high-fashion editorial portrait of adult fashion model with serious neutral expression, built around reeded frosted-glass refraction. Subject: adult fashion model with serious neutral expression wears structured red blazer with front-facing editorial gaze with the right side of the face in sharp focus; the right side of the face stays sharply detailed while the left side fragments behind glass. Scene: soft light pink studio background stays clean and minimal so the vertical reeded frosted glass and face detail remain dominant. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Preserved reeded frosted glass editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic high-fashion editorial photography, serious neutral expression, realistic glass blur, feature fragmentation, refraction, and clean magazine composition. Color Palette: Fixed red blazer, soft light pink studio background, cool blue-purple color grade, glass translucency, and natural skin tones. Lighting: Cool dramatic studio lighting with crisp face detail on the right, soft refracted highlights through glass, and controlled blue-purple shadows. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Reeded Frosted Glass Editorial Portrait Soft Light Pink Studio Background

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 high-fashion editorial portrait of Editorial portrait photo of a model in a red blazer against a soft light pink studio background., built around reeded frosted-glass refraction. Subject: Editorial portrait photo of a model in a red blazer against a soft light pink studio background. wears deep crimson tailored blazer with still front-facing pose with one eye refracted behind vertical glass; the right side of the face stays sharply detailed while the left side fragments behind glass. Scene: pale blush studio backdrop stays clean and minimal so the vertical reeded frosted glass and face detail remain dominant. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Preserved reeded frosted glass editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Lighting: Cool dramatic studio lighting with crisp face detail on the right, soft refracted highlights through glass, and controlled blue-purple shadows. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
